prompt: Maintainer sprint: implement local telemetry aggregation slice for end-to-end-loop with backlog and GitHub Copilot feedback gates.
commands_or_evidence: Added scripts/telemetry_aggregate.py as stdlib-only local JSONL to telemetry-summary-v0 aggregation helper.
GitHub Copilot PR review comments inspected via gh API; fixed validator forbidden-key gap and install helper packaging gap.
Telemetry fixture now includes caveman-compliance quality gate and example summary remains fixture-only with raw_logs_included=false.
Verification commands recorded in final sprint report.

acceptance_criteria.evidence: Aggregator reads explicit JSONL input, emits aggregate JSON only, refuses forbidden raw/private keys, and has no network path.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Fixture aggregation is deterministic and scoped.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Example summary has source=fixture, runs=1, median_duration_ms=300000, caveman_compliance_rate=1.0, copilot_available_rate=0.0, claim_scope=fixture-only.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Copilot must-fix/should-fix findings are processed before PR readiness claims.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Two Copilot comments were collected and addressed locally: fixture validator now rejects command/args, install script copies documented helper scripts.

learning_candidates.text: Telemetry aggregation emits only summary fields and keeps raw local JSONL out of shareable artifacts; public claims need human approval.
Validator must reject telemetry fixture keys command/args as forbidden raw command material, matching recorder privacy contract.

copilot_findings.summary: PR #5 Copilot reviewer had 2 comments; both were addressed in local changes before final verification.

items.summary: Validator telemetry fixture privacy check did not forbid command/args.
Install script omitted documented scripts used by local telemetry docs.

notes: Aggregation slice completed locally; CI status is checked after push.
